purpose: RumorHandler factory for LEAVE_INTENT_KIND (kind 13). Parses leave-intent MLS application messages and enqueues the leave action via injected dep. Zero context/ imports. Pure dispatch module.

public_api.name: LeaveHandlerDeps
public_api.signature: interface LeaveHandlerDeps { enqueueLeave: (groupId: string, pubkey: string) => void }
public_api.description: Dep bag for the leave handler. The single dep is a callback that enqueues the remove action. Provided as a stub in registerHandlers.ts (MOCK-S2-001) until S4 replaces it with the real MarmotContext closure.

public_api.name: createLeaveIntentHandler
public_api.description: Factory that returns a RumorHandler for LEAVE_INTENT_KIND. The handle() body calls parseLeaveIntent(rumor.content), returns early on null, then calls deps.enqueueLeave(ctx.groupId, payload.pubkey).

stub_mechanism.description: enqueueLeave stub in registerHandlers.ts buildDispatcher() uses Option A: required in HandlerDeps type, defaulting to a no-op closure when caller omits it. Comment marks it as placeholder to be replaced in S4.

registration.change: Add enqueueLeave to HandlerDeps interface; append createLeaveIntentHandler({ enqueueLeave: deps.enqueueLeave ?? (() => {}) }) to handlers[]
